beats.narration: An echo's height by itself means nothing. Ultrasonic evaluation compares every indication to a known reference, established on a certified standard, with the same setup.

payload.title: COMPARED, NOT READ
payload.sub: Evaluation is comparison against a known reference.

beats.narration: Three machined reflectors do the comparing: flat-bottom holes face straight beams, side-drilled holes answer any wedge angle, notches mimic surface-breaking flaws.
But machined reflectors are ideal targets. Natural flaws sit tilted, rough, or tightly closed. Match a 3 millimeter hole; the real flaw is probably larger.

payload.heading: Equivalent size, not true size
payload.note: TRUE SIZE: LIKELY LARGER, ALMOST NEVER SMALLER

beats.narration: Keep the comparison honest: a serialized, certified block matching your material, transfer correction for rough parts, evaluation at reference gain, and record everything.

chips.s: So it can be rebuilt exactly

beats.narration: Amplitude comparison ranks indications; it does not size flaws. Measured against the standard: that's what evaluation means in ultrasonic testing.

payload.sub: Measured against the standard — that is evaluation.
